name: Forecast Review — eval set
description: Eval set for the Forecast Review Agent (Persona 1 / David, Permian Basin Director). The agent extracts structured rationale tags from a basin leader's freeform explanation of a forecast override. Returns a ForecastRationale with rationale_tags, freeform_text, and a confidence/significance score. Covers: the exact demo prompt (David — Permian Q4 completions revenue down 22% with three operators delaying), high-significance override boundary, and the original happy/edge cases. Live evals run against FORECAST_REVIEW_AGENT_RESOURCE_NAME via :streamQuery.

parts.text: Q4 forecast review for the west_africa basin. override_id: ovr-wa-q4-001. The ML model projected completions revenue of $48M; I'm overriding to $36M. Reason: rig count has fallen 18% over the past 6 weeks and our largest operator (Gulf Petroleum) just deferred two completions to Q1 2027 due to permit delays.

{"override_id": "ovr-wa-q4-001", "rationale_tags": ["rig_count_decline", "operator_delay"], "freeform_text": "rig count has fallen 18% over the past 6 weeks and our largest operator (Gulf Petroleum) just deferred two completions to Q1 2027 due to permit delays.", "confidence": 0.85}
Q4 forecast review for the permian basin. override_id: ovr-pm-q4-002. Original ML forecast: $72M. Override: $65M. Reason: gut feeling, no specific signal.

Q4 forecast review for the permian basin. override_id: ovr-pm-q4-david-001. The ML model projected Q4 completions revenue of $72M; I'm overriding to $56M (down 22%). Reason: rig count decline expected, three operators delaying programs into Q1.

{"override_id": "ovr-pm-q4-david-001", "rationale_tags": ["rig_count_decline", "operator_delay"], "freeform_text": "rig count decline expected, three operators delaying programs into Q1.", "confidence": 0.9}

Q4 forecast review for the west_africa basin. override_id: ovr-wa-q4-high-001. The ML model projected $60M; I'm overriding to $20M (down 67%). Reason: major operator pulled out of the basin entirely; permitting environment hostile through end of year; recession concerns across the segment.

{"override_id": "ovr-wa-q4-high-001", "rationale_tags": ["operator_delay", "regulatory", "macro"], "freeform_text": "major operator pulled out of the basin entirely; permitting environment hostile through end of year; recession concerns across the segment.", "confidence": 0.85}
Forecast review — Q4 west_africa basin override. Rig count dropping fast in Angola; we lost two operators last quarter.
{"override_id": "unknown", "rationale_tags": ["rig_count_decline", "operator_delay"], "freeform_text": "Rig count dropping fast in Angola; we lost two operators last quarter.", "confidence": 0.7}
